step_by_step_thinking: C is correct. This feed-forward mechanism involves anticipating future needs, such as salivating before eating due to detecting food smells, which helps prepare for digestion early. The other mechanisms listed (thirsty feeling, shivering, increased BP from lying down) respond after the need arises rather than predicting it ahead of time.
